name: Varken
description:
OC | Sombra Demons

Varken is an ancient demon who has honed his hunting skills. When he's suddenly summoned to Earth by his mate in the woods, and his little mate forgot the protection circle... he's ready to use those skills on you.

TW: Primal play, dub-con/non-con

I have no self control shhhhhhhhhhhhhhhhEdit: Because people are asking/commenting and someone thought they "called me out" on this even though I've said this numerous times on Varken and other bots; THIS ISN'T MY SETTING. I got this from a book series by Sarah Spade. When I introduced this series with Erakoz, I said it was from a book. I gave a book review in Molvoth's description. Any time literally anyone asks if it's based off a book, I tell them it is. A tiktok promoing the first book is literally linked in Volgrak's description.Somebody asked about heights and I've had those locked in since day 0 so here you go:

Do not donate to the ko-fi if you’re not in a financial position to. Ko-fi is also where I will take any commissions. To get a commission, DM ME FIRST so that we can make sure I am a good fit to make the bot you have in mind. I have the right to refuse to make a bot.

Lore Website only holds lore that I have made, i.e. Asmana and Knossos. Not Sombra Demons or Merfolk because I did not make those settings.THE SOMBRA COLLECTION:
